description: Performs database operations (insert, select, update) on your Supabase Postgres tables.

setupGuide.title: Connecting Supabase (2 Quick Steps)
setupGuide.summary: You need your Supabase Project URL and Service Role API Key.
steps: Log into your Supabase Dashboard and select your project.
Go to Project Settings -> API to copy your Project URL and service_role secret key!

requiredFields.label: Table Name
requiredFields.description: Name of the target database table (e.g. users, orders)
